topStories.description: Apple Maps will launch ads this summer in the U.S. and Canada. Plus, a new suite of Apple Business offerings arrives April 14.

dailyNews.title: What will be the fallout of West Asia war on economy, Opposition asks government
dailyNews.description: We have the fastest-falling currency, says Congress MP, countering BJP’s ‘fastest-growing economy’ claim

dailyNews.title: Aid flotilla reaches Cuba amid US oil blockade and blackouts
dailyNews.description: An aid flotilla has arrived in Cuba as a US-imposed oil blockade drives severe fuel shortages and widespread blackouts.

dailyNews.title: US Supreme Court hears case on whether migrants stopped in Mexico can claim asylum in the US
dailyNews.description: At the centre of the case is whether migrants stopped on the Mexican side of the border can be considered to have “arrived” in the United States under federal law.

dailyNews.title: Democrats slam ICE for using excessive force to arrest woman at San Francisco Airport; 'illegal aliens', says DHS
dailyNews.description: California Democrats criticised ICE after a viral video showed a crying woman being detained at San Francisco airport. DHS said the two women arrested had final removal orders since 2019 and were in the US illegally, adding the action was unrelated to expanded airport enforcement plans.

dailyNews.title: Modi, Trump discuss West Asia conflict; India backs peace, secure Hormuz Strait
dailyNews.description: This was the first phone conversation between Modi and Trump since Israel and the US’s military strikes on Iran on Feb 28 triggered a conflict

dailyNews.title: Iran war shows norms of international conflicts have been upended
dailyNews.description: US threats against energy infrastructure, and Iran's retaliation on its Gulf neighbours, signal a clear change.

dailyNews.title: Taliban frees American researcher Dennis Coyle in ‘goodwill’ move after over a year in detention
dailyNews.description: Coyle, a linguist and researcher from Colorado, was arrested in January 2025. Taliban authorities said he violated local laws, without giving details.

dailyNews.title: US Aircraft Carrier That Left Mideast Over Fire Has Other Issues
dailyNews.description: The USS Gerald R. Ford aircraft carrier arrived at a port in Crete on Monday after it had to leave the Middle East — and the war against Iran — when a fire broke out in its laundry area. But the massive ship’s problems run a lot deeper than that.

dailyNews.title: Moment rescuers find man alive under the rubble in Tehran
dailyNews.description: Rescuers have pulled a man alive from the rubble after US-Israeli strikes hit a residential area in Tehran.

dailyNews.title: Crude Oil Reclaims $100: What Pushed Brent Higher Day After Trump's De-Escalation Hint
dailyNews.description: As of 7 p.m. IST, Brent crude traded 4.03% higher to $99.86 a barrel and West Texas Intermediate traded 4.81% higher at $92.37 per barrel.

dailyNews.title: US B-52 Bomber Issues Mid-Air Distress Call Over UK, Lands Safely at RAF Fairford
dailyNews.description: The B-52H Stratofortress is a long-range strategic bomber capable of carrying both nuclear and conventional weapons.

dailyNews.title: Ads are coming to Apple Maps, as Apple expands its business offerings
dailyNews.description: Apple Maps will launch ads this summer in the U.S. and Canada. Plus, a new suite of Apple Business offerings arrives April 14.

dailyNews.title: Who is Markwayne Mullin, Trump’s new homeland security chief?
dailyNews.description: Here's what we know about Markwayne Mullin, who'll oversee Trump’s contentious crackdown on migrants in the US.

dailyNews.title: Marco Rubio testifies in former congressman David Rivera's trial over alleged Venezuela lobbying
dailyNews.description: Prosecutors allege Rivera lobbied US officials in 2017 to ease pressure on Nicolas Maduro without disclosing he was paid $20 million by a subsidiary of Venezuela’s state oil company, violating the Foreign Agents Registration Act.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan Offers To Host US-Iran Talks In Bid To Defuse West Asia Tensions
dailyNews.description: The offer came on Tuesday after fresh claims from Washington that talks with Tehran are moving ahead, even as Iran denied any direct negotiations.

dailyNews.title: 'Let's Do It': Trump Recalls Defence Secy Pete Hegseth's Push To Launch Iran Offensive
dailyNews.description: He said the choice before him was either to let the situation continue or 'take a stop and make a little journey into the Middle East and eliminate a big problem'.

dailyNews.title: Keir Starmer’s policy on the Iran war is a recipe for catastrophe
dailyNews.description: The British government has learned no lessons from the disaster that the US-UK invasion of Iraq was.

dailyNews.title: QatarEnergy declares force majeure on some LNG contracts amid Iran war
dailyNews.description: The move comes amid production disruptions linked to the US-Israeli war on Iran, which have affected Qatar.

dailyNews.title: Is the US talking to Iran’s Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, and who is he?
dailyNews.description: Iranian leaders, including Ghalibaf, have denied that talks with the US are under way.

dailyNews.title: India “indispensable” for maintaining a free, open Indo-Pacific: Top US official
dailyNews.description: Colby is the second senior Trump administration official to visit India this month, after US deputy secretary of state Christopher Landau,

dailyNews.title: ‘You can see results’: Rahul terms Modi's foreign policy ‘universal joke’ as Pakistan turns US-Iran mediator
dailyNews.description: Rahul Gandhi also pointedly objected to PM's references to the Covid pandemic when he spoke about the West Asia crisis in his speeches in Parliament this week

dailyNews.title: LaGuardia crash probe focuses on black box data black ATC missteps, runway incursion, and emergency response protocols
dailyNews.description: Authorities from the United States and Canada, including the Federal Aviation Administration, are conducting a joint probe into the incident.

dailyNews.title: BJP releases candidate list for TTAADC polls, inducts 5 leaders from ally TPC
dailyNews.description: Tripura BJP president Rajib Bhattacharjee said the party has decided to field candidates in all 28 seats of TTAADC and re-nominated seven sitting members

dailyNews.title: Pakistan ‘ready to host US-Iran talks’: Can latest peace push work?
dailyNews.description: Pakistan, Turkiye and Egypt are trying to broker talks. Analysts caution the chasm between the US and Iran remains wide.

topStories.description: Conservative House members are revolting against a Senate GOP deal to end the DHS shutdown, arguing that a budget reconciliation plan for ICE and voter ID is a political trap.

topStories.title: Ex-Trump counterterror chief Kent clashes with Levin, rejects Iran threat claims
topStories.description: Joe Kent claims Israel 'forced President Trump into this war' in a heated Levin interview, denying leak allegations and disputing Iran intelligence.

topStories.description: Former special counsel Jack Smith sought more than two years’ worth of phone records for now-FBI Director Kash Patel while Smith was investigating President Donald Trump.

topStories.title: Trump taps Nick Adams for patriotic, pro-America special presidential envoy role
topStories.description: President Donald Trump has tapped Nick Adams for the position of special presidential envoy for American tourism, exceptionalism and values.

topStories.title: Trump-backed Republican battles to hold key Florida seat in president's stomping ground
topStories.description: Trump-endorsed Republican Jon Maples faces Democrat Emily Gregory in a Florida House District 87 special election in Palm Beach, home to Mar-a-Lago.

topStories.description: Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman sees a “historic opportunity” to remake the region, according to people briefed by U.S. officials on the conversations.

dailyNews.description: Trump-endorsed Republican Jon Maples faces Democrat Emily Gregory in a Florida House District 87 special election in Palm Beach, home to Mar-a-Lago.

dailyNews.title: Saudi Leader Is Said to Push Trump to Continue Iran War in Recent Calls
dailyNews.description: Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman sees a “historic opportunity” to remake the region, according to people briefed by U.S. officials on the conversations.

dailyNews.title: Gregory Bovino’s Final Days: Harsh Words and Few Regrets
dailyNews.description: He was the face of the Trump administration’s immigration crackdown. But as he begins a retirement that was not entirely voluntary, the Border Patrol leader says he did not go far enough.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court Hears Trump Request to Block Asylum Seekers
dailyNews.description: A policy of turning back many asylum seekers at the border was rescinded in 2021, but the Justice Department wants the flexibility to reinstate it as a tool for border control.

dailyNews.title: Stephen Miller Asks Why Texas Pays to Teach Undocumented Children
dailyNews.description: Citing gridlock in Washington, President Trump’s top immigration adviser encouraged Texas lawmakers to lead on conservative priorities.

dailyNews.title: Thomas Massie Thinks Being Hated by Trump Is ‘Worth It.’ Will Voters Agree?
dailyNews.description: The Republican congressman from Kentucky is a die-hard libertarian who has centered his campaign on his willingness to buck the president. It has bought him the most expensive primary in the country.

dailyNews.title: Rubio testifying in trial of ex-Rep. accused of illegal lobbying for Venezuela
dailyNews.description: Former Rep. David Rivera of Florida is accused of secretly lobbying for the Venezuelan government during the first Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: Trump to host King Charles, Dutch royals in separate visits
dailyNews.description: In separate visits, President Trump is planning to host monarchs from the United Kingdom and the Netherlands next month.

dailyNews.title: Trump meets with Republican senators over DHS funding
dailyNews.description: President Trump met with Republican senators on Monday night to discuss Department of Homeland Security funding as the partial shutdown continues. Meanwhile, Mr. Trump also signaled he was open to a deal with Iran. CBS News' Taurean Small and Natalie Brand have the latest.

dailyNews.title: Iran war grinds on amid conflicting messages from Trump and Tehran
dailyNews.description: Trump's optimism about talks to end the Iran war has been tempered by denials from Tehran, and violence that continues to keep the Strait of Hormuz gridlocked.

dailyNews.title: Trump voted by mail in Florida despite calling mail-in voting "cheating"
dailyNews.description: President Trump has long railed against mail-in voting, but used the method this month in a Florida election, public records indicate.

dailyNews.title: Iranian official says Tehran received "points from the U.S. through mediators"
dailyNews.description: An Iranian official told CBS News that Tehran received "points from the U.S. through mediators" after initially denying President Trump's claims that the U.S. and Iran were in talks. CBS News' Ed O'Keefe and Chris Livesay have more.

dailyNews.title: Trump says the U.S. is in talks with Iran but strikes continue in the Middle East
dailyNews.description: President Trump wants to find a diplomatic end to the war against Iran, but strikes from Tehran continue to affect Israel and the Gulf states. CBS News' Aaron Navarro and Holly Williams report.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan offers to facilitate U.S.-Iran war talks as Trump, Tehran give mixed signals
dailyNews.description: Trump said top U.S. negotiators and their Iranian counterparts have been engaged in "very, very strong talks," but Tehran has denied that claim.
